title: Xtra Spicy Ukrainian Chicken Kebabs
description: A spicy and juicy Ukrainian dish featuring sweet smoked paprika and yuzu-cure, perfect for a light and flavorful meal. This halal-friendly recipe is great for anyone looking for a taste of Eastern European cuisine.
instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Thread the chicken pieces onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
In a large bowl, whisk together the sweet smoked paprika, yuzu juice, garlic, olive oil, salt, black pepper, and cayenne pepper.
Add the chicken skewers to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Let the chicken marinate for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours in the refrigerator.
Grill the chicken skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until they are cooked through and slightly charred.
Let the chicken rest for a few minutes before serving.
Serve the chicken skewers hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
